summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 of 25 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No merge, fix, or close action is planned; hydrated PRs are retained for maintainer review or proof/check repair, and missing-hydration PRs are scoped to needs_human.
